name: speculator
description: Graph-oriented knowledge base for AI coding sessions. Speculator stores your architecture as a knowledge graph of entities and edges right in your repo — so Claude queries the graph instead of re-reading dozens of files. Ships a TypeScript CLI + MCP server, hook-driven context injection on every prompt, and agents for graph curation. Stop paying tokens to find your own code. Runs on macOS/Linux; Windows via WSL2 or Git Bash.
